ogTitle: Metcalfe East vs Mia Mia: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Metcalfe East and Mia Mia.
heading: Metcalfe East vs Mia Mia — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Metcalfe East, Victoria and Mia Mia, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Mia Mia has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Metcalfe East (46/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Metcalfe East or Mia Mia safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Metcalfe East has a flood risk score of 53/100, while Mia Mia scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Metcalfe East scores 64/100 for bushfire risk. Mia Mia scores 25/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Metcalfe East or Mia Mia?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Mia Mia has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.38% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
